title: Shop event envelope (02 §4.3)
description: The envelope every Kafka message carries. Each topic's <version>.schema.json embeds this shape and narrows `event_type` (const) + `payload` (topic-specific). registryctl asserts every topic schema conforms to this envelope. Evolution is governed by D30: additive-only within a topic; a shape change is a new .v2 topic with a dual-publish window + enforced deprecation date.

event_id.description: Prefixed ULID evt_… — dedupe key in the consumer inbox.
